offer_name: Concierge Reporting Pack for Niche Ecommerce Operators
recommended_direction: Sell a done-for-you monthly operator briefing that turns ecommerce and marketing data into findings and actions, with tiers based on store complexity.
core_promise: We turn messy store, marketing, and product data into a short monthly operator briefing with clear actions on what to fix, cut, repeat, and watch next.

best_fit: Running at least one paid acquisition channel
avoid_initially: Very early stores with too little data
Enterprise merchants with advanced BI expectations
Highly complex multi-region or multi-warehouse businesses unless custom quoted

tiers.name: Growth Pack
tiers.fit: Moderate-complexity stores needing deeper channel and product analysis

tiers.name: Custom / Complex Store
tiers.fit: Multi-store, multi-brand, or operationally complex businesses

scope_controls: Additional ad account or marketing channel

recommended_framing: Monthly operator briefing for ecommerce founders
Done-for-you reporting that ends with recommended actions
Analytics without hiring an in-house analyst

pilot_offer.shape: One-time paid diagnostic or first-month reporting pack with fixed scope

key_risks: Pricing mismatch between simple and complex stores
Messy source data increasing fulfillment effort
Buyers perceiving overlap with existing dashboards
final_recommendation: Proceed with a tiered concierge reporting offer centered on a standardized monthly deliverable, protected by setup fees and explicit complexity boundaries. Lead with a paid pilot and avoid broad custom analytics positioning until demand and pricing are validated.
